name: SUPERINTENDENT OF INSURANCE OF NEW YORK v. BANKERS LIFE & CASUALTY CO. et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in SUPERINTENDENT OF INSURANCE OF NEW YORK v. BANKERS LIFE & CASUALTY CO. et al. (404 U.S. 6, 1971 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
